name: solve
description: Run a pinned SMT or BTOR2 solver on hand-written input. The harness exposes the SAME solver binaries the riscv-btor2 pair uses but with no translation, schema, annotation, or lift help. You must hand-write the encoding yourself. The verdict is the solver's literal sat/unsat/unknown; mapping it back to reachable/unreachable/proved/unknown is your responsibility.

input_language.description: Must be 'smt2' for z3/bitwuzla/cvc5 and 'btor2' for pono.

input_text.description: The full input to feed the solver on stdin.

options.description: Optional per-engine flags. Recognised: bound (int, pono only), timeout (seconds, float), produce_models (bool, smt2 engines).
